component.name: Chip
component.description: Pill-shaped filter tag for toggling a selection state. Default: neutral border and subtle text. Selected: brand border and brand text. Pure selection indicator — not a navigation element. Label-only; no dropdown arrow.

when: Filtering a list or carousel by category (e.g. All Courses, Design, Development)
Toggling a discrete selection option among a group of peers
Showing current filter state visually — selected chip reads as brand-colored

antiPatterns.scenario: Using Chip for navigation that changes the URL
antiPatterns.reason: Chip renders a <button> — links that produce a URL change should be <a> elements.
antiPatterns.alternative: Use an anchor tag or a Tab component if routing is needed.

antiPatterns.scenario: Using Chip for a primary call-to-action
antiPatterns.reason: Chips signal filter/selection; they carry no action weight.
antiPatterns.alternative: Use Button for actions (submit, save, download).

antiPatterns.scenario: Using Chip with a dropdown arrow
antiPatterns.reason: The dropdown variant is out of scope; the page uses label-only chips.
antiPatterns.alternative: Compose a Select or a custom popover for dropdown filtering.

purpose.false: Resting state. Transparent background, subtle text, default border.
purpose.true: Active selection. Brand border and brand text to signal the active filter.

states.description: Transparent background, subtle text, default border.
Adds neutral-subtlest background; border and text unchanged.
Brand border and brand text; toggled via the selected prop.
Muted text and border; pointer-events blocked natively.

ariaAttributes: aria-pressed — reflects the selected state so screen readers announce active/inactive

keyboardInteractions.action: Toggles the chip selection (caller controls state)
Moves focus to the next focusable element

accessibility.notes: Uses a native <button> element with aria-pressed. The caller is responsible for managing the selected state and grouping chips in a meaningful container (e.g. role=group with aria-label).

compositionPatterns.name: filter-bar
compositionPatterns.description: A horizontal row of Chip components for category filtering, where one chip is selected at a time.
